_comment: Spells to hide from the character spells tab and the guild /spellcheck command. Roman-numeral suffixes are stripped automatically, so 'Fighting Chance' also blocks 'Fighting Chance I', 'Fighting Chance II', etc. Wildcard patterns use fnmatch syntax: * matches any characters (including spaces), ? matches one character. Patterns are matched against the Roman-stripped, lowercased base name. One entry per line for easy diffing.
